summary: WhatsApp daily limit tracking feature testing complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI shows limit tracker with progress bar, dropdown with options 20/30/40/50/100, and WhatsApp buttons are green (#25D366). All 4 tabs (HOME, WHATSAPP, EMAIL, STATS) work correctly.

issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor hydration warning from React dev tools, does not affect functionality
